name: Low-Temperature Pasteurization Treatment
recipeInstructions:
1. Place jars in a canner filled halfway with warm water.
2. Add hot water until it is at least 1 inch above the jars.
3. Heat the water so that the temperature reaches and maintains between 180°F and 185°F for 30 minutes.
4. Verify the water temperature is at least 180°F using a candy or jelly thermometer throughout the 30-minute period.
5. Avoid temperatures higher than 185°F, as they may cause pickles to become too soft.
6. Use only when the recipe specifies this treatment.
